description: Termly provides privacy compliance tools such as consent banners, cookie scanning, and legal policy management for websites. Its product also includes consent state retrieval for backend integrations and partner-facing account/site management APIs.
summary: termly.io exposes two documented HTTP APIs: a signed Partner REST API at `https://api.termly.io` and a website-specific Consent API at `https://termly.io/api/v1`; no GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI was found.
